@graph.name: Hesed
@graph.description: Hesed holds and builds companies in software and services, patiently and for good. Today: Pipestaff, LokiMode, and Colorado CareAssist.

subOrganization.name: Pipestaff
subOrganization.description: Exclusive caregiver hiring leads for home care agencies. CNAs, HHAs, and aides, each routed to a single agency.

subOrganization.name: LokiMode
subOrganization.description: The operating system for a modern home care agency: scheduling, payroll operations, billing, and compliance in one system of record.

subOrganization.name: Colorado CareAssist
subOrganization.description: A licensed Colorado home care agency. Personal and dementia care, live-in care, care for veterans, and end-of-life support across the Front Range, since 2012.
